title: Extra Large Print Sudoku Puzzle Book
subtitle: 100 Easy to Hard Puzzles with Giant 30-Point Numbers — One Puzzle Per Page, Solutions Included — Easy-on-the-Eyes Brain Games for Seniors and Low-Vision Adults
author: BrainCraft Publishing
primary_keyword: extra large print sudoku puzzle book
cover_prompt: Front cover for an Extra Large Print Sudoku puzzle book. Clean modern minimal design, calm and dignified, age-appropriate for seniors and low-vision adults. Large 9x9 sudoku grid in upper-center with a few giant numbers visible (4, 7, 2). Bold readable sans-serif title at top. Soft warm gradient background (cream-to-soft-blue or warm parchment). High contrast text. NO clutter, NO cartoon characters, NO frames. Professional puzzle-book aesthetic similar to AARP / dover / brainstorm imprints.
differentiator: 24-30pt numerals, 1 puzzle per page, puzzle completion stickers placeholder
ip_risk_notes: Sudoku is generic. Avoid 'Will Shortz', 'Penny Press', 'KAPPA', 'New York Times' style branding.

recommended_categories_2026._book_format: PAPERBACK (8.5x11, 128p) — uses Amazon Books tree (zgbs/books). NOT a Kindle eBook (puzzle books don't work on Kindle, separate node tree zgbs/digital-text would apply if it did).
recommended_categories_2026._selection_criteria: All 3 must satisfy: (1) topic match — describe what the book IS (sudoku/logic/puzzle), not who buys it. (2) format match — paperback nodes only. (3) Blue Ocean weakness — top BSR > 20K + royalty < $2K preferred. Audience signals (seniors, large print) belong in subtitle/keywords, NEVER in category selection.

primary.kdp_path: Books > Humor & Entertainment > Puzzles & Games > Sudoku
primary.weakness_assessment: WEAK_LEADER — top is 'Sassy Woman's Retirement Activity Book' (a multi-puzzle activity book, not pure sudoku); BSR 44K means low absolute sales. Easiest target in puzzle subtree.
primary.rationale: Tier-1 pick. Lowest royalty bar (~$50-80/day ads gets to top 5).

secondary.kdp_path: Books > Humor & Entertainment > Puzzles & Games > Logic & Brain Teasers
secondary.topic_match: STRONG — sudoku is a logic puzzle / brain teaser by definition.
secondary.weakness_assessment: MEDIUM_LEADER — top is 'Tricky Logic Puzzles for Adults' (hard logic, different segment). No large-print sudoku at top = uncontested angle.
secondary.rationale: Tier-2 pick. Same Puzzles & Games parent, valid topic, weak large-print presence.

tertiary.kdp_path: Books > Humor & Entertainment > Puzzles & Games > Puzzles
tertiary.weakness_assessment: MEDIUM_LEADER — same level as Logic & Brain Teasers. Top is 'Tricky Logic Puzzles' (shared bestseller across both leaves).
tertiary.rationale: Tier-3 pick. Wider net — captures buyers browsing 'Puzzles' generic, not just sudoku-searchers.

rejected_options.health_fitness_aging: REJECT — audience match only, NOT topic match. Sudoku is not a health/aging book. Amazon will move category and may flag listing.
rejected_options.self_help_memory_improvement: REJECT — same audience-only mismatch + top BSR 506 / $22,867 mo royalty (VERY_HARD). Topic mismatch + budget infeasible.
rejected_options.puzzles_games_parent_4402: REJECT — KDP requires leaf categories, not parents. Top BSR 1368 / $11,291 mo also too competitive.
rejected_options.crossword_puzzles_4416: REJECT — different topic (word vs number). Top BSR 350 / $67,939 mo (NYT Games dominates).
rejected_options.kindle_sudoku_16232543011: REJECT — wrong tree. This is the Kindle digital-text node. Our book is paperback only; puzzle books have poor Kindle UX (readers can't pencil in numbers).

post_publish_category_requests: Books > Humor & Entertainment > Puzzles & Games > Brain Teasers (if exists as separate leaf from Logic & Brain Teasers — file KDP ticket to verify + add)
Books > Crafts, Hobbies & Home > Crafts & Hobbies > Reference (some sudoku books rank here historically)
